---
nocite: |
  @luken_mexca_2024
---

# Beyond Text {#sec-week11}

::: {.callout-note}
## Week 11
**Lecture:** Social science applications for multimodal data\
**Lab:** Working with images, audio and video in Python
:::

## Lecture

*Content to be added.*

## Lab

*Content to be added.*

## Readings

- @luken_mexca_2024
